info.title: Simulation API
info.description: An API for managing simulations within ANSYS Additive.

get.description: Use this endpoint to check server status.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: the organization id to get items for.  Must be provided as API callers only have access to items belonging to their organization.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: starting paging count; ex. 60 will skip the first 60 items in the list

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: number of items to return within the query

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: key:direction pairs for one or multiple field sort orders.  e.g. sort=key1:desc,key2:asc

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: If true, will only return archived items.  If false, will only return unarchived items.  If not provided, will return both archived and unarchived items.

post.description: Creates a new material for the organizationId specified

simulationId.description: id of associated simulation, set server-side, read-only

activityName.description: the name of the Amazon SWF activity

workerVersion.description: the version of the worker, e.g. 1.9.0

percentComplete.description: number 0 - 100 representing percentage of activity already completed

simulationId.description: id of associated simulation, set server-side, read-only

label.description: User readable label of what the output contains

fileLocation.description: Location of file, usually an S3 location

simulationId.description: id of associated simulation, set server-side, read-only

xMin.description: Smallest x coordinate of the part location on the powder bed in millimeters. The center of the powder bed in the x dimension is assumed to be 0

yMin.description: Smallest y coordinate of the part location on the powder bed in millimeters. The center of the powder bed in the y dimension is assumed to be 0

zMin.description: Not used at present. This must be set to 0

partSupportId.description: Id of the support to use for the simulation. Can be null

partSupportConfigurationId.description: Id of the PartSupportConfiguration to use for the simulation. Can be null

originalFileName.description: The original file name from the user

fileLocation.description: Location of file, usually an S3 location

availability.description: Describes the availabity of the part. Uploaded - the part has been uploaded.  Processing - the part is being processed.  Available - the part was processed successfully and can be used in simulations.  Error - an error occurred, contact Ansys Support.

archived.description: True if simulation has been archived, false otherwise

xMin.description: Smallest x coordinate of the part location on the powder bed in millimeters. The center of the powder bed in the x dimension is assumed to be 0

yMin.description: Smallest y coordinate of the part location on the powder bed in millimeters. The center of the powder bed in the y dimension is assumed to be 0

zMin.description: Not used at present. This must be set to 0

sizeX.description: Width of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

sizeY.description: Length of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

sizeZ.description: Height of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

originalX.description: The smallest x location before transformation

originalY.description: The smallest y location before transformation

originalZ.description: The smallest z location before transformation

triangleCount.description: Number of triangles in the original STL file, calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

volume.description: Approximate volume of the Part (in meters^3), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

created.description: created time stamp, set server-side, read only

createdBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

lastModified.description: last modified time stamp, set server-side, read only

lastModifiedBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

estimatedMemory.description: Estimated memory usage for mechanics solver using estimateVoxelSize

maxMemory.description: Estimated max memory usage for mechanics solver using estimateVoxelSize

estimateVoxelSize.description: Voxel size used for estimatedMemory, maxMemory, estimatedWork

errorReason.description: If an error occurs uploading a part, a string will be populated in this field.

partSupports.description: List of supports that have been uploaded for this part

originalFileName.description: The original file name from the user

fileLocation.description: Location of file, usually an S3 location

archived.description: True if simulation has been archived, false otherwise

availability.description: Describes the availabity of the part. Uploaded - the part has been uploaded.  Processing - the part is being processed.  Available - the part was processed successfully and can be used in simulations.  Error - an error occurred, contact Ansys Support.

supportType.description: type of support used for simulation.

xMin.description: Smallest x coordinate of the part location on the powder bed in millimeters. The center of the powder bed in the x dimension is assumed to be 0

yMin.description: Smallest y coordinate of the part location on the powder bed in millimeters. The center of the powder bed in the y dimension is assumed to be 0

zMin.description: Not used at present. This must be set to 0

sizeX.description: Width of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

sizeY.description: Length of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

sizeZ.description: Height of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

triangleCount.description: Number of triangles in the original STL file, calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

volume.description: Approximate volume of the Part (in meters^3), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

created.description: created time stamp, set server-side, read only

createdBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

lastModified.description: last modified time stamp, set server-side, read only

lastModifiedBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

estimatedMemory.description: Estimated memory usage for mechanics solver using estimateVoxelSize

maxMemory.description: Estimated max memory usage for mechanics solver using estimateVoxelSize

estimateVoxelSize.description: Voxel size used for estimatedMemory, maxMemory, estimatedWork

minimumSupportHeight.description: Distance to move the part off the base plate for supports, Must be between 0 to 0.005 meters

errorReason.description: If an error occurs uploading a part, a string will be populated in this field.

lockToPartTranslation.description: Whether the support should be translated with the part (true), or a minimumSupportHeight will be specified (false).

archived.description: True if simulation has been archived, false otherwise

partSupportSections.description: List of sections that are included in the configuration

simulationId.description: id of associated simulation, set server-side, read-only

archived.description: True if simulation has been archived, false otherwise

materialId.description: ID of the material to use in the simulation

materialConfigurationId.description: ID of the material configuration that was used in the simulation, set server-side, read only

machineId.description: ID of the machine to use in the simulation

machineConfigurationId.description: ID of the machine configuration that was used in the simulation, set server-side, read only

started.description: time stamp, set server-side, read only

completed.description: time stamp, set server-side, read only

created.description: created time stamp, set server-side, read only

createdBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

lastModified.description: last modified time stamp, set server-side, read only

lastModifiedBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

simulationFolder.description: s3 folder used to store input and output files for the simulation

workflowId.description: workflow identifier - will be provided by the system

numberOfCores.description: indicate the number of cores with which to run the simulation

voxelLayers.description: number of voxel layers in the voxelized part + supports

sliceLayers.description: number of slice layers in the part

layerThicknessValues.description: Array of layer thickness values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0.00001 to 0.0001 meters

laserWattageValues.description: Array of laser power values to simulate across, Each value must be between 10 to 1000 watts

scanSpeedValues.description: Array of scan speed values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0.01 to 10 meters/second

hatchSpacingValues.description: Array of hatch spacing values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0.00001 to 0.001 meters

slicingStripeWidthValues.description: Array of slicing strip width values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0.001 to 0.1 meters

meshLayersPerLayer.description: Number of mesh layers used to simulate a single deposit layer

beadType.description: Type of single bead simulation - either bead on plate or bead on powder.

laserWattageValues.description: Array of laser power values to simulate across, Each value must be between 10 to 1000 watts

scanSpeedValues.description: Array of scan speed values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0.01 to 10 meters/second

powderThermalConductivityValues.description: Array of Powder Thermal Conductivity Percentage Values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0% and 100%, expressed as a decimal

powderPackingDensityValues.description: Array of Powder Packing Density Percentage Values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0% and 100%, expressed as a decimal

laserAbsorptivityInPowderValues.description: Array of Powder Laser Absorptivity Values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0% and 100%, expressed as a decimal

laserAbsorptivityInSolidValues.description: Array of Solid Laser Absorptivity Values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0% and 100%, expressed as a decimal

solidusTemperatureValues.description: Array of Solidus Temperature Values Values to simulate across

liquidusTemperatureValues.description: Array of Liquidus Temperature Values Values to simulate across

simulationParts.description: List of parts to simulate (current limit is one part, imposed by server)

buildFileId.description: Id of build file being simulated, mutually exclusive with simulationParts

minimumThickWallThickness.description: Must be between 0.00005 to 0.0003 meters, Must be less than maximumWallThickness

maximumThickWallThickness.description: Must be between 0.00015 to 0.002 meters, Must be greater than minimumWallThickness

thinWallThickness.description: The width of the thinwall supports

minimumSupportHeight.description: Distance to move the part off the base plate for supports, Must be between 0 to 0.005 meters

supportFactorOfSafety.description: Multiplier for support calculations, Must be between 0.1 to 10

outputLayerVtk.description: if true, mechanics solver output will include a zip file with the stress / distortion state at the end of each voxel layer

bladeCrashThreshold.description: should be a number between 0.5 and 1.5

performDistortionCompensation.description: if true, a predistorted STL file will be created using the distortion simulated by the mechanics solver

distortionScaleFactor.description: a value that is used to scale the simulated distortion value

distortionScaleFactorValues.description: Array of distortion scale factor values, each one will produce a separate distortion output

outputSupportsVtk.description: if true, a VTK file of the support structure will be created

supportFailureThreshold.description: should be a number between 0.01 and 1.0

partFailureThreshold.description: should be a number between 0.01 and 1.0

strainWarningThreshold.description: should be a number between 0.01 and 1.0

performDistortionCompensationAfterCutoff.description: if true, a predistorted STL file will be created using the distortion after cutoff simulated by the mechanics solver

distortionAfterCutoffScaleFactor.description: a value that is used to scale the after cutoff simulated distortion values

distortionAfterCutoffScaleFactorValues.description: Array of distortion after cutoff scale factor values, each one will produce a separate distortion after cutoff output

supportType.description: type of support used for simulation.

voxelSampleRate.description: the amount of sub voxels per voxel in each direction (x,y,z)

outputPointThermalHistory.description: for each slectedPoint, a series of vtk files will output thermal history around that point with a radius of staticVirtualSensorRadius.

staticVirtualSensorRadius.description: should be a number between 0.05 and 5.0 mm

includeStressAnalysis.description: false indicates that only the thermal solver will run, while true indicates that the mechanics solver will run after the thermal solver

selectedPoints.description: List of points where the thermal solver will collect thermal history - limit 10

outputInstantDynamicSensor.description: if true, dyanmic sensor data will be collected for each layer specified in the instantDynamicSensorLayers property

instantDynamicSensorRadius.description: radius for instant dynamic sensor data collection in mm

instantDynamicSensorLayers.description: Array of integer layer numbers where instant dynamic sensor data will be collected

outputPrintRitePcsSensor.description: if true, PrintRite sensor data will be collected for each selectedPoint property

printRitePcsSensorRadius.description: radius for PrintRite sensor data collection in mm

pyroVirtualSensorOutputAllLayers.description: if true, pyrometer sensor data will be collected for every layer

outputInstantStaticSensor.description: if true, instant static sensor data will be collected for each selectedPoint property

instantStaticSensorRadius.description: radius for instant static sensor data collection in mm

outputPointProbe.description: if true, probe sensor data will be collected for each selectedPoint property

outputCoaxialAverageSensorData.description: if true, coaxial average sensor data will be collected for the deposity layers specified by coaxialAverageSensorZHeights

coaxialAverageSensorRadius.description: should be a number between 0.05 and 1.5 mm

coaxialAverageSensorZHeights.description: list of z height (mm) ranges within the part where the coaxial average sensor will collect data

meshResolutionFactor.description: multiplier of fine grid spacing for course grid portion of FEA mesh

fileLocation.description: Location of file, usually an S3 location

coreVersion.description: version of the core material this material was derived from

isCore.description: flag whether it is a core material or a custom material

archived.description: True if simulation has been archived, false otherwise

key.description: key associated with this material.  e.g. Ti64

configurationId.description: identifier for the active configuration for this material

created.description: created time stamp, set server-side, read only

createdBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

lastModified.description: last modified time stamp, set server-side, read only

lastModifiedBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

thermalSimulationApproved.description: true if the material properites have been tuned for thermal simulations

microstructureSimulationApproved.description: true if the material properites have been tuned for microstructure simulations

materialId.description: ID of the material to use in the simulation

created.description: created time stamp, set server-side, read only

createdBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

lookupFileLocation.description: Location where the lookup file is stored.  Set server side.  Only used internally.

w0LookupFileLocation.description: Location where tuning method lookup file is stored. Set server side. Only used internally.

machineId.description: ID of the machine to use in the simulation

created.description: created time stamp, set server-side, read only

createdBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

beamDiameter.description: diameter of laser beam in meters

coolingToScanningTimeIncrementRatio.description: ratio between cooling to scanning time

totalCoolingTime.description: cooling time prior to deposition of next powder layer in seconds

layerDelay.description: delay time between layers, stored in seconds

scanLineDelay.description: delay time between scan lines, stored in miliseconds

isCore.description: flag whether it is a core material or a custom material

archived.description: True if simulation has been archived, false otherwise

key.description: key associated with this material.  e.g. Ti64

configurationId.description: identifier for the active configuration for this material

created.description: created time stamp, set server-side, read only

createdBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

lastModified.description: last modified time stamp, set server-side, read only

lastModifiedBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

value.description: The value to be used within the operations.

from.description: A string containing a JSON Pointer value.

simulationId.description: id of associated simulation, set server-side, read-only

label.description: User readable label of what the output contains

zMin.description: Not used at present. This must be set to 0

sensorType.description: type of point, usually relates to sensor that will be using this point

buildFileLocation.description: folder containing build file contents, multiple files may be contained within the folder

stlFileLocation.description: path to STL file describing the part geometry

sliceZipFileLocation.description: path to ZIP file containing scan pattern information for each powder deposition layer

archived.description: True if simulation has been archived, false otherwise

availability.description: Describes the availabity of the part. Uploaded - the part has been uploaded.  Processing - the part is being processed.  Available - the part was processed successfully and can be used in simulations.  Error - an error occurred, contact Ansys Support.

sizeX.description: Width of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

sizeY.description: Length of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

sizeZ.description: Height of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

createdBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

lastModifiedAt.description: time stamp of last change made to this build file

lastModifiedBy.description: assigned user, set server-side, read only

fileCreatedDate.description: creation time stamp from original build file

errorReason.description: If an error occurs uploading a part, a string will be populated in this field.

machineType.description: type of machine associated with this build file

materialType.description: material to use when performing simulation

jobId.description: job number associated with this build file

jobName.description: job name associated with this build file

totalScanDistance.description: total distance laser travels when building the part

originalX.description: The smallest x location before transformation

originalY.description: The smallest y location before transformation

originalZ.description: The smallest z location before transformation

supportModelFileLocation.description: path to support model file relative to buildFileLocation

uploadFileLocation.description: path to uploaded zip file containing build file components, relative to s3 part bucket

buildFileSupports.description: List of supports for this buildfile

buildFileId.description: Id of build file being simulated, mutually exclusive with simulationParts

originalFileName.description: The original file name from the user

fileLocation.description: Location of file, usually an S3 location

supportType.description: type of support used for simulation.

sizeX.description: Width of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

sizeY.description: Length of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

sizeZ.description: Height of the Part bounding box (in meters), calculated when the part is processed, use 0 for initial post

fileUploadLocation.description: path of ZIP file containing build file elements

machineType.description: type of machine associated with this build file

zHeightLowerBound.description: lower bound of area of interest for z dimension in meters

zHeightUpperBound.description: upper bound of area of interest for z dimension in meters

originalFileName.description: The original file name from the user

fileLocation.description: Location of file, usually an S3 location

partSupportIds.description: Ids for the part supports used in the configuration

partSupportConfigurationId.description: Id of the PartSupportConfiguration to use for the simulation. Can be null

partSupportId.description: Id of the support to use for the simulation. Can be null

startingLayerAngleValues.description: Array of starting layer angles to simulate across. Each value must be 0 to 180 degrees

layerRotationAngleValues.description: Array of layer rotation angles to simulate across. Each value must be 0 to 180 degrees

layerThicknessValues.description: Array of layer thickness values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0.00001 to 0.0001 meters

laserWattageValues.description: Array of laser power values to simulate across, Each value must be between 10 to 1000 watts

scanSpeedValues.description: Array of scan speed values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0.01 to 10 meters/second

hatchSpacingValues.description: Array of hatch spacing values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0.00001 to 0.001 meters

slicingStripeWidthValues.description: Array of slicing strip width values to simulate across, Each value must be between 0.001 to 0.1 meters

heaterTemperatureValues.description: Array of printer heater temperature values in degrees kelvin. Each value must be 293 and 474.

microstructureSensors.description: List of sensor locations within the part where the microstructure will be evaluated

userProvidedThermalData.description: True if user is providing cooling rate, thermal gradient and melt pool dimensions for each sensor. False if thermal solver should calculate these values. See MicrostructureSensor.

randomSeed.description: Seed value used for random number generation. If not provided it will be auto-generated.

simulationId.description: id of associated simulation, set server-side, read-only

label.description: User readable label of what the output contains

sensorDimensionLength.description: Length of an edge of the sensor cube, 0.0001 to 0.001 meters

sensorX.description: X coordinate of center of the sensor volume in meters

sensorY.description: Y coordinate of center of the sensor volume in meters

sensorZ.description: Z coordinate of center of the sensor volume in meters

coolingRate.description: Cooling rate of material in kelvin/sec. Only used when userProvidedThermalData is true on the simulation model.

thermalGradient.description: Thermal gradient in kelvin/meter. Only used when userProvidedThermalData is true on the simulation model.

meltPoolWidth.description: Width of melt pool in meters. Only used when userProvidedThermalData is true on the simulation model.

meltPoolDepth.description: Depth of melt pool in meters. Only used when userProvidedThermalData is true on the simulation model.
